'''Mrlsst Spaceport''' was a [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] located close to the [[Mrlsst Trade and Science Academy|Mrlsst Academy]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Mrlsst/Legends|Mrlsst]]<ref name="TEGtPaM" /> in the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]].
